Hero.description: Seamless execution meets flawless design. Experience a new tier of productivity wrapped in an interface that anticipates your every move.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.section1Content: PlanIt is engineered with a privacy-first architecture. We collect only strictly necessary cryptographic telemetry to ensure system integrity.
Privacy.section2Content: All tasks and synchronization queries are processed through secured, decentralized nodes. No external parties have access to your raw inputs.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.section1Content: By initializing the PlanIt ecosystem, you agree to adhere to strict operational guidelines. Misuse of the synchronization nodes or abuse of the API endpoints is strictly prohibited.
Terms.section2Content: The PlanIt architecture, including its modular command system and custom UI personalization features, remains the exclusive intellectual property of its core engineers.
